Alex Maldonado Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in Chicago, Illinois. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Alex Maldonado Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 142 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
